headline: APA shares are trading higher after Piper Sandler maintained its Neutral rating on the stock and raised its price target from $30 to $37.

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Neutral on APA, Raises Price Target to $37
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Mark Lear   maintains APA (NASDAQ:APA) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $30 to $37.

headline: RBC Capital Raises APA Target as Oil Strength and Earnings Momentum Support Shares
summary: APA Corporation (NASDAQ:APA) is included among the 14 Low PE High Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 5, RBC Capital raised its price recommendation on APA Corporation (NASDAQ:APA) to $29 from $26. The firm reiterated a Sector Perform rating on the shares. The analyst said the stock has been supported by strong oil […]
